body.title: DickSimnel: seed 3 builder-role tickets so it has work to process
body.result: filed T-dicksimnel-toolloop-docstrings, T-dicksimnel-worker-listener-tests, T-shim-docstring-pass — all role=builder, all S
body.intention: I intend that DickSimnel's poll loop finds and processes real tickets instead of running idle indefinitely.
body.description:
**Problem:** Granny only dispatches role=builder or role=creator tickets to DickSimnel. All current sprint/pending tickets are role=master. DickSimnel's 30s poll loop runs but returns nothing — it's starved, not broken.

**What to build:** File 3 S-sized tickets with role=builder covering genuinely mechanical work DickSimnel can handle:
1. A docstring pass on a module with missing/stale docstrings
2. A test coverage gap on an already-tested file
3. A small utility cleanup (rename, type hints, dead code)

Each ticket must have concrete Completion criteria, role=builder, and worker=dicksimnel.

**Affected files:** None (ticket creation only)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** File 3 tickets with role=builder and worker=dicksimnel; do not run DickSimnel
**Completion criteria:** 3 new tickets visible in cc_queue list with role=builder status=sprint worker=dicksimnel
